Public Attributes | List of all members
MB_PreserveLightmapData Class Reference

This script is used to fix a bug where lightmapping on combined meshes is not preserved after reloading a scene or entering gamemode. This problem was caused by the lightmap index and scale offset data being lost. This script sets the lightmap index and scale offset back to where it should be so that lightmapping is actually preserved. More...

Inheritance diagram for MB_PreserveLightmapData:

Public Attributes

int lightmapIndex
 
Vector4 lightmapScaleOffset
 

Detailed Description

This script is used to fix a bug where lightmapping on combined meshes is not preserved after reloading a scene or entering gamemode. This problem was caused by the lightmap index and scale offset data being lost. This script sets the lightmap index and scale offset back to where it should be so that lightmapping is actually preserved.
